description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a clean, rectangular design and a predominantly white exterior. The house features large windows, a rooftop terrace with greenery, and a driveway with two parked cars. Surrounding the house are several trees and landscaped plants, adding a touch of nature to the urban setting. The main entrance is accentuated by a small overhang and a central pathway leading from the driveway. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back to create outdoor living space. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with an emphasis on geometric lines and open, functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, rooftop terrace, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two parked cars, main entrance with overhang, and central landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the setback upper story, rooftop terrace, and dense tree coverage on one side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, extended terrace, and a row of trees lining the back of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, single parked car, and minimal window placement on this facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a flat overhang, direct pathway from driveway, and minimal decorative elements
